description: Default Claude Code settings for the WooCommerce repository

hooks.command: jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE "/(build|build-module|build-style|build-types|dist)/|[.]asset[.]php$"; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"This is a generated/built file. Edit the source instead."}'; fi; }
